Dear Park Office,

I hope this message finds you well today. We wish to inquire about picnic table availability soon. Many families need these spots for summer gatherings. Please confirm if any tables remain open for booking. We plan to host twelve guests on July twenty-first. Children will need extra space for safe playtime. We also require trash bins for easy cleanup later. This event aims to bring our community together closely. It is time to secure our spot before it slips away.
